_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 expression profiling in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma: genomic associations and survival outcomes.

_contextSnippet: The NFC immunostain was immunoreactive in 26 tumors (41%), whereas 34 (54%) had minimal or absent staining, one had equivocal staining
details: Immunoreactive in 26 tumors (41%), minimal or absent staining in 34 (54%), with inter-core heterogeneity noted in seven tumors
